event.prompt: Let's research novel composition approaches similar to LoRA as a new means/new standard that could work with MoE - research via notebooklm and reference the material found for the top 3 possible approaches. Pick a promising one and append the others to IDEAS.md

Let's research unique novel approaches for MoE and approaches to 'reverse' the training to fully compatible entities. E.g. using training data to reconstruct the knowledge graph that was put into the model and possible 'snapshots' to the attention/knowledge of an llm has 'memory-like' behaviours to be able to reconstruct training data (similar to lossless algorithms) - research via notebooklm and reference the material found for the top 3 possible approaches. Pick a promising one and append the others to IDEAS.md
